summary: Frontend testing completed for KPI Glossary/Tooltip feature on Platform Dashboard (God Mode). All GlossaryPanel components and KpiInfo tooltip buttons are working correctly across Dashboard, Churches, Solomon Pay, and Donors sections. Fixed 'Abundant Northeast' to 'Abundant Downtown' rename issue by invalidating the platform stats cache.

issues: Console hydration warnings: <th> inside <span> and <tr> inside <span> - React rendering issue but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: HTML hydration warnings in PlatformDashboard.jsx table structure - <span> elements wrapping <th> and <tr> elements cause React hydration errors. Consider restructuring the table header mapping to avoid span wrappers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: KPI Glossary feature fully tested and working. All sections have GlossaryPanel components with proper data-testids (glossary-dashboard, glossary-portfolio, glossary-churches, glossary-solomonPay, glossary-donors). KpiInfo tooltip buttons work correctly - clicking shows definition popup. Abundant campuses sort to top of church lists. 'Abundant Downtown' rename is now working after cache invalidation.

fix_applied.issue: Abundant Northeast was still showing instead of Abundant Downtown
fix_applied.root_cause: Platform stats cache was stale and contained old name
fix_applied.fix: Invalidated platform_stats_cache by deleting the cached entry, forcing fresh data fetch from tenants collection
fix_applied.verification: API now returns 'Abundant Downtown' and UI displays correctly
